overall.description: A slow panoramic view of a medieval-style cottage interior rendered in a game engine, featuring a stone fireplace, wooden beams, and warm interior lighting contrasting with the blue hour sky visible through the windows. The camera smoothly pans from left to right, revealing a dining area and kitchen space in a cozy, detailed rustic setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cottage living area with stone fireplace

agents.ego_description: slowly panning the camera rightward to survey the cozy interior space

entered.detail: large stone hearth with burning fire and hanging iron cooking pot
black iron pot suspended over the fire by a metal arm
crackling fire with visible flames in the hearth
tall wooden shelving unit against the left wall
large earthenware storage vessels on the shelves
two windows with green fabric curtains showing blue hour sky outside
wide plank wooden flooring with warm tone
textured area rug on the floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cozy medieval cottage interior focused on a stone fireplace with a crackling fire and hanging cooking pot. Wooden shelves with ceramic jugs line the left wall, while two windows with green curtains reveal the blue hour sky outside. The camera slowly pans right across the wooden floor and woven rug, establishing the warm, rustic atmosphere of the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: dining area with wooden table and candlelight

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan right, revealing the central dining area of the cottage

entered.detail: rustic wooden table with sturdy legs in the center of the room
red and white checkered cloth covering the dining table
simple wooden chairs around the dining table
lit candles providing warm illumination on the table
wooden balustrade of the upper loft level overlooking the room

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans right, the stone fireplace moves out of view and a wooden dining table with a checkered tablecloth comes into the center of the frame. Lit candles on the table cast a warm glow, while the wooden loft railing becomes visible overhead. The windows with green curtains shift to the left side of the frame as the view opens toward the back of the cottage.

scene_state.functional_zone: kitchen area with storage shelves and back door

agents.ego_description: completing the panoramic survey by revealing the kitchen area and back door

entered.detail: food preparation area with counters and storage
heavy wooden door with iron hinges at the back of the room
lit lantern suspended from the ceiling near the door
stacked ceramic cooking pots and vessels
shelving unit with various kitchen items and containers

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the right side of the cottage featuring a kitchen area with wooden shelves holding ceramic pots and cooking vessels. A heavy wooden door with iron hinges sits at the back, illuminated by a hanging lantern. The dining table shifts to the left side of the frame as the camera completes its slow panoramic survey of the detailed medieval interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous panoramic sweep through a cozy medieval cottage, transitioning from a warm hearth to a detailed rustic kitchen. It begins focused on a stone fireplace with a crackling fire and hanging pot, while wooden shelves and windows revealing a blue hour sky frame the left side of the room. As the camera pans right across the woven rug, the fireplace recedes to make way for a wooden dining table draped in a checkered cloth and illuminated by glowing candles. The view then expands further to reveal a wooden loft railing overhead before shifting toward the back of the cottage. Finally, the scene opens onto a kitchen area filled with ceramic pots and cooking vessels, ending the movement at a heavy iron-hinged door lit by a hanging lantern.
